_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for infographics — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk declares.

vars.PROMPT: <infographic content description; required only for the generate perk>
vars.OUTPUT_NAME: <output image filename, e.g. chart.png; required only for the generate perk>
vars.OPENROUTER_API_KEY: <OpenRouter API key; required only for the generate perk>
